title: Add production recovery verification loop
description: Back To Service currently detects Sentry issues and triggers repair, but production recovery is not complete until the correct Vercel project/domain is healthy. Add a post-repair verification loop that checks target Vercel deployment status, production domain HTTP health, Sentry issue quieting/resolution state, and GitHub issue status. Final decision should be recovered, still_failing, needs_human, or retry_repair. This should run after agent:sync/agent:run dispatch and be testable offline.
close_reason: Implemented target app config (productionUrl, vercelProjectId, sentryProjectSlug, healthCheck settings) and full verification loop (deploy check, HTTP health check, Sentry quieting check) with 23 new tests

title: Model explicit target app mapping
description: Add explicit configuration/state for each protected app: Sentry org/project/environment, GitHub owner/repo, Vercel project/team/domain, and production URL. The live SnapSync test showed multiple Vercel projects can deploy from one repo, so Back To Service must verify the exact project/domain that serves production instead of assuming any deployment success means recovery.
close_reason: Implemented target app config (productionUrl, vercelProjectId, sentryProjectSlug, healthCheck settings) and full verification loop (deploy check, HTTP health check, Sentry quieting check) with 23 new tests

title: Document live incident findings and current automation boundary
description: Write up the NODE-EXPRESS-3 live test: Sentry detected intentional frontend boot crash, Back To Service created/updated GitHub issue, Claude workflow triggered but was blocked by Anthropic credit balance, manual patch removed SENTRY_TEST_CRASH from snapsyncai, Vercel eventually restored production. Document what is automated today, what was manual, and what must be automated next for honest assignment/product documentation.
notes: Reopen: closed in error. Recovery loop landed in commit 5a74576 (agent:recover); the writeup itself still needs to happen.
close_reason: Completed README documentation of current production agent loop, assignment mapping, usage, evals, and limitations.

title: Unblock live Claude repair with Anthropic credits and production auth choice
description: Live Back To Service trigger reached Claude Code in snapsyncai, but run 25484040408 failed with Anthropic: Credit balance is too low. Decide whether production target workflow should keep demo GITHUB_TOKEN path, install official Claude GitHub App, or use a dedicated custom GitHub App token. Then rerun /back-to-service fix on LefterisXefteris/snapsyncai#1 and confirm a draft PR is created.

title: ingest Sentry production errors and sync GitHub issues
close_reason: Implemented and verified issue-first Sentry sync with Claude dispatch audit trail; existing incidents remain non-spammy and retry through recovery policy.
